case_title: EDWARD SEYMORE III VS. LISA TURNER

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,638.60 FILED BY SEYMORE III, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER, LISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SEYMORE III, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER, LISA
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF SEYMORE III, EDWARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-21-2008, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TURNER, LISA
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT PRESENT IN COURT, EVIDENCE RETAINED, NOTHING ON RECORD. CLERK-BETH WILBER, 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEYMORE III, EDWARD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TURNER, LISA THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED WAS INSUFFICIENT TO ESTABBLISH THAT THE MONEY USED TO PAY THE DEFENDANT'S CREDIT ACCOUNT WAS AN LOAN AGREEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF SEYMORE III, EDWARD
